Bash(cd "D:\\src\\AI\\kimbeggar-main" && venv/Scripts/python -c "
import pandas as pd
from strategy.indicators import calculate_rsi, calculate_moving_average, detect_golden_cross, detect_dead_cross
from strategy.hedge_logic import calculate_hedge_ratio, describe_hedge
from strategy.signal import SignalEngine, SignalType
from config.settings import Settings

prices = pd.Series\([float\(x\) for x in range\(50, 80\)] + [float\(x\) for x in range\(79, 49, -1\)]\)
rsi   = calculate_rsi\(prices, 14\)
sma5  = calculate_moving_average\(prices, 5\)
sma20 = calculate_moving_average\(prices, 20\)
gc    = detect_golden_cross\(sma5, sma20\)
dc    = detect_dead_cross\(sma5, sma20\)

print\('RSI[-1]={:.2f}  SMA5[-1]={:.1f}  SMA20[-1]={:.1f}'.format\(rsi.iloc[-1], sma5.iloc[-1], sma20.iloc[-1]\)\)
print\('GoldenCross any={}  DeadCross any={}'.format\(gc.any\(\), dc.any\(\)\)\)

r1 = calculate_hedge_ratio\(58000, 60000, 0.30, -2.0\)
r2 = calculate_hedge_ratio\(62000, 60000, 0.30,  0.5\)
print\('hedge\(58k, ma=60k, idx=-2%\): {:.4f}'.format\(r1\)\)
print\('hedge\(62k, ma=60k, idx=+0.5%\): {:.4f}'.format\(r2\)\)

settings = Settings\(\)
engine   = SignalEngine\(settings\)
ohlcv    = [{'stck_clpr': str\(int\(p\)\)} for p in prices.tolist\(\)]

sig    = engine.evaluate\('005930', ohlcv\)
sig_sl = engine.evaluate\('005930', ohlcv, entry_price=85.0\)
print\('Signal: {}  RSI={:.1f}'.format\(sig.signal_type.value, sig.rsi\)\)
print\('StopLoss check: {}'.format\(sig_sl.signal_type.value\)\)

idx_mock_down = {'bstp_nmix_prdy_ctrt': '-1.8'}
idx_mock_up   = {'bstp_nmix_prdy_ctrt': '-0.5'}
print\('HedgeTrigger\(-1.8%\): {}'.format\(engine.check_hedge_signal\(idx_mock_down\)\)\)
print\('HedgeTrigger\(-0.5%\): {}'.format\(engine.check_hedge_signal\(idx_mock_up\)\)\)
print\('ALL TESTS PASSED'\)
" 2>&1)
